scripts.install: pnpm --prefix ph-clint install && pnpm --prefix ph-clint-dev install && pnpm --prefix ph-clint-cli/ph-clint-app install && pnpm --prefix ph-clint-cli/ph-clint-cli install
scripts.build: pnpm --prefix ph-clint build && pnpm --prefix ph-clint-dev build && pnpm --prefix ph-clint-cli/ph-clint-app build && pnpm --prefix ph-clint-cli/ph-clint-cli build
scripts.test: pnpm --prefix ph-clint test && pnpm --prefix ph-clint-dev test && pnpm --prefix ph-clint-cli/ph-clint-app test && pnpm --prefix ph-clint-cli/ph-clint-cli test
